evidence_quotes.quote: The product should display a logo to indicate that a service or subscription is purchased with a finite duration rather than a stand-alone product
there should also be a description of the product in which the guaranteed lifespan can be found

paragraphs.text: Games are emotional from the time you spend and the memories you have. If it is reasonably possible to keep games available without increasing costs, it is unreasonable for a publisher to destroy the game only because it has designed the game in a way that requires maintenance in order to continue. If the publisher nevertheless chooses to do so, there should also be a description of the product in which the guaranteed lifespan can be found. The product should display a logo to indicate that a service or subscription is purchased with a finite duration rather than a stand-alone product
